Event: The Twilight Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 06/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: S31
Twilight Hero Sword

When attacking, has a 30% chance of restoring 16% health in self.
When an enemy unit is resurrected, the sword wielder throws the sword at them, dealing 700000 pure damage to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around them. They can't recover health for 4 sec. The resurrected unit is also stunned for 4 sec. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
